options.name: --ignore-config
options.description:
(Default: false) Ignore the local configuration and
use the default process for interaction.

options.name: --clean-up
options.description:
(Default: false) Kill all aria2c processes before
starting the download.

options.name: --no-interaction
options.description:
(Default: false) Disable interaction and use the
command-line parameters.

options.name: --service
options.description:
(Default: hf) The service to download the model from.
Support hf | civitai | ms

options.name: --use-hf-mirror
options.description:
(Default: false) Use the hf-mirror
(https://hf-mirror.com/) for downloading. Only
available when service is hf.

options.name: --token
options.description: (Default: ) The token to use for authentication.

options.name: --save-dir
options.description: (Default: ) The directory to save the model to.

options.name: --include
options.description: (Default: ) The files to include in the download.

options.name: --exclude
options.description: (Default: ) The files to exclude in the download.
